name: @xpaysh/audit-service
description: Deployable hosted-audit service for audit.xpay.sh. Wraps @xpaysh/storefront-audit behind GET /api/v1/audit (JSON), /badge.svg (badge), / (HTML report). Generic Node handler — runs on Vercel, AWS Lambda (via Function URL or API Gateway), Cloudflare Workers (via shim), Express, or bare Node http.
author: xpay✦ <hello@xpay.sh>
